  <script>
        // Wait for DOM load
        let langselcnt = 'first';
        let isFirstOpen = true; // Flag to track first chat open

        // Track chat state in sessionStorage
        function updateChatState(isOpen) {
            sessionStorage.setItem('isChatOpen', isOpen);
            console.log(`Chat state updated: isOpen = `);
        }

        // Function to wait for an element to be available
        function waitForElement(selector, callback) {
            const element = document.querySelector(selector);
            if (element) {
                callback(element);
            } else {
                setTimeout(() => waitForElement(selector, callback), 100);
            }
        }

          // Function to get the language of the browser
            function getBrowserLanguage() {
            //const lang = navigator.language || navigator.userLanguage;
			 const lang = document.documentElement.lang;

    /* Styles for the language tooltip */
    .language-tooltip {
      position: absolute;
      top: 10px;
      right: 60px; /* Position before the close button */

      color: white;
      padding: 5px 10px;

      transition: background-color 0.3s ease;

      background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);

    .language-dropdown {
      display: none;
      position: absolute;
      top: 100%;
      right: 0;

      box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);

      background-color: white;
      border: none;
      text-align: left;
      cursor: pointer;
    }

    .language-dropdown button:hover {
      background-color: #f0f0f0;
    }

    .language-tooltip:hover .language-dropdown {
      display: block;

<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
    const dfMessenger = document.querySelector('df-messenger');
    let timers = [];

    // Multilingual stages with absolute times (since last activity)
    const stages = [
      {
        time: 5 * 60 * 1000,
        messages: {
          en: "I haven’t heard from you in a while. Would you like to continue?",
          es: "Hace tiempo que no sé de ti. ¿Quieres continuar?"
        },
        event: "NO_INPUT_5MIN"
      },
      {
        time: 15 * 60 * 1000,
        messages: {
          en: "This session will remain open for a few more minutes. Please respond if you’d like to continue.",
          es: "Esta sesión permanecerá abierta unos minutos más. Por favor responde si deseas continuar."
        },
        event: "NO_INPUT_15MIN"
      }
    ];

    function getCurrentLang() {
      return dfMessenger.getAttribute("language-code") || "en";
    }

    function scheduleTimers() {
      // Clear any existing timers
      timers.forEach(t => clearTimeout(t));
      timers = [];

      const lang = getCurrentLang();

      // Schedule all stages relative to now
      stages.forEach(stage => {
        const t = setTimeout(() => {
          const message = stage.messages[lang] || stage.messages["en"];
          console.log(`Stage  (lang=)`);

          dfMessenger.renderCustomText(message);
          dfMessenger.sendRequest({ event: stage.event });
        }, stage.time);

        timers.push(t);
      });
    }

    function resetInactivity() {
      console.log("Reset inactivity + reschedule all timers");
      scheduleTimers();
    }

    // Reset on user or bot activity
    window.addEventListener("df-request-sent", resetInactivity);
    window.addEventListener("df-response-received", resetInactivity);

    // Watch language changes
    const observer = new MutationObserver(mutations => {
      mutations.forEach(mutation => {
        if (mutation.attributeName === "language-code") {
          console.log("Language changed to:", getCurrentLang());
        }
      });
    });
    observer.observe(dfMessenger, { attributes: true });

    // Start timers at load
    scheduleTimers();
  });
</script>

    <div class="tsg-rwd-main-copy-frame ">
        <div class="tsg-rwd-main-copy-body-frame withrail">
            <div class="tsg-rwd-page-subheader">
                <a name="inner-content" id="inner-content" href="javascript:void(0);" title="start of main content"></a>
                <h1>How to Request a Copy of a Panama Canal Zone Record</h1>
            </div>
            <div class="tsg-rwd-content-page-parsysxxx parsys"><div class="tsg-rwd-text parbase section">

<div style="margin-top:5px">

     
    <p></p><p>We issue copies of birth and death records from the Panama Canal Zone that were issued between 1904 and 1979.</p>
<p>You can request a copy of these records if you are:</p>
<ul>
<li>The individual listed on the document, </li>
<li>A legal guardian of the individual listed on the document,</li>
<li>An authorized government agency, or</li>
<li>A person who has written permission from the individual listed on the document.</li>
</ul>
<p>The Panama Canal Commission kept the birth records of persons born in the Panama Canal Zone between 1904 and 1979. In December 1999, the Commission gave the records to the U.S. Department of State.</p>
<p>People born in the former Panama Canal Zone did not automatically get U.S. citizenship at birth. In addition to a Panama Canal Zone birth certificate, U.S. passport applicants must submit evidence of their parents U.S. citizenship to prove their claim to U.S. citizenship.</p>
<p></p>

</div></div>
<div class="accordion parbase section">

<div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion">

    <a href="javascript:void(0);" title="Open all accordions" id="set_1" data-category="TSG_Accordions" data-action="Steps to request the copy - Open all accordions" class="hideThis trackDAP tsg-rwd-accordion-All-control-tsg_rwd_show_all_button">ALL <span class="fa fa-plus"></span>/<span class="fa fa-minus"></span></a>
    <a href="javascript:void(0);" title="Close all accordions" id="set_1-sister" class="trackDAP tsg-rwd-accordion-All-control-sister" data-category="TSG_Accordions" data-action="Steps to request the copy - Close all accordions">ALL <span class="fa fa-plus"></span>/<span class="fa fa-minus"></span></a>

    <a href="javascript:void(0);" class="tsg-rwd-accordion-header trackDAP" aria-expanded="false" title="Steps to request the copy" data-category="TSG_Accordions" data-action="Steps to request the copy" id="accNum0" aria-controls="accSect0"> 
      <h4 class="tsg-rwd-accordion-header-name-frame">
        Steps to request the copy 
        </h4>
        <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-open"><span class="fa fa-plus-circle"></span></div>
        <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-close"><span class="fa fa-minus-circle"></span></div>
    </a>
    <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-copy" role="region" id="accSect0" aria-labelledby="accNum0">
        <p>To request a copy, follow these steps:</p>
<p>1. Fill out a notarized, completed <a href="https://eforms.state.gov/Forms/ds5542.PDF" title="Form DS-5542 PDF" adhocenable="false" target="_blank">Form DS-5542<b></b></a></p>
<ul>
<li>Fill out the form on your computer</li>
<li>If you complete the form by hand, use black ink</li>
<li>Sign the form in front of a notary public to avoid delays</li>
</ul>
<p>2. Get a photocopy of the front and back of your valid photo ID<b>.</b> Examples include:</p>
<ul>
<li>State-issued driver’s license</li>
<li>Non-driver photo ID</li>
<li>Military ID</li>
<li>Passport</li>
<li>Prison or inmate ID</li>
</ul>
<p>If you don't have any of these IDs, please see <a href="/content/travel/en/replace-certify-docs/requesting-a-record/vital-records-ids.html" title="Passport Vital Records IDs">Passport Vital Records IDs</a>.</p>
<p>3<b>. </b>Get a check or money order. The cost is $50 for each record you request.<b></b></p>
<ul>
<li>Make payable to the "U.S. Department of State"</li>
<li>Include a complete mailing address on the check</li>
<li>Must be payable in U.S. dollars through a U.S. bank</li>
</ul>
<p>4. Mail <a href="https://eforms.state.gov/Forms/ds5542.PDF" title="Form DS-5542 PDF" adhocenable="false" target="_blank">Form DS-5542</a>, a photocopy of the ID, and payment to<b>:</b></p>
<p>    U.S. Department of State<br>
    Passport Vital Records Section<br>
    44132 Mercure Cir.<br>
    PO Box 1213<br>
    Sterling, VA  20166-1213</p>
<p>We can only provide official copies of records on file with the U.S. Department of State.</p>
<p><b>Processing Times</b></p>
<ul>
<li>Once we receive your request in our office, we should process it in <b>4 to 8 weeks</b>. </li>
<li>Some documents may take longer than 8 weeks to locate. We do not offer expedited service.</li>
<li>Mailing times (which may add up to 4 weeks) are not included in processing times.</li>
<li>To avoid delays, provide complete information on your Form DS-5542 and include all your supporting documents.</li>
</ul>
<p><b>Shipping</b></p>
<p>We will send your vital record to you. If you live in the United States, you can select First Class Mail or 1-3 Day Delivery:</p>
<ul>
<li>USPS First Class Mail: Takes one to two weeks. No extra charge. </li>
<li>1-3 Day Delivery Service: Add $22.05 to the check or money order. </li>
</ul>
<p>If you live outside the United States, we will send your vital record to the nearest U.S. embassy or consulate. The embassy or consulate will coordinate with you to pick up or deliver your record.</p>

        <div class="additional_component parsys"></div>
 
    </div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="accordion parbase section">

<div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion">

    <a href="javascript:void(0);" class="tsg-rwd-accordion-header trackDAP" aria-expanded="false" title="Can I have someone else request my record?" data-category="TSG_Accordions" data-action="Can I have someone else request my record?" id="accNum1" aria-controls="accSect1"> 
      <h4 class="tsg-rwd-accordion-header-name-frame">
        Can I have someone else request my record? 
        </h4>
        <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-open"><span class="fa fa-plus-circle"></span></div>
        <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-close"><span class="fa fa-minus-circle"></span></div>
    </a>
    <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-copy" role="region" id="accSect1" aria-labelledby="accNum1">
        <p>Yes, you can give permission to a family member or friend who has known you for at least five years. We need:</p>
<ul>
<li>Your signed, written permission. For example: "I, [write your name], give permission to [write your friend or family member's name] to request my Panama Canal Zone record on my behalf."</li>
<li>A photocopy of your valid photo ID.</li>
<li>A notarized statement from the person who is requesting your records.</li>
<li>A photocopy of the front and back of the valid photo ID of the person making the request.</li>
</ul>

        <div class="additional_component parsys"></div>
 
    </div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="accordion parbase section">

<div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion">

    <a href="javascript:void(0);" class="tsg-rwd-accordion-header trackDAP" aria-expanded="false" title="How to request an apostille on your document" data-category="TSG_Accordions" data-action="How to request an apostille on your document" id="accNum2" aria-controls="accSect2"> 
      <h4 class="tsg-rwd-accordion-header-name-frame">
        How to request an apostille on your document 
        </h4>
        <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-open"><span class="fa fa-plus-circle"></span></div>
        <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-close"><span class="fa fa-minus-circle"></span></div>
    </a>
    <div class="set_1 tsg-rwd-accordion-copy" role="region" id="accSect2" aria-labelledby="accNum2">
        <p>An apostille certifies a document so countries in the <a href="#ExternalPopup" title="1961 Hague Convention link" class="ext_link" data-toggle="modal" data-url="https://www.hcch.net/en/instruments/conventions/status-table/?cid=41">1961 Hague Convention<span class="fa fa-external-link-alt ext_link"></span></a> will recognize it. </p>
<p>If you have a Panama Canal Zone record issued within the last five years, you don't need to pay for the apostille. If we issued your document more than five years ago, you must submit a request for a new Panama Canal Zone record.</p>
<p>If you need an apostille on your Panama Canal Zone record, you must submit a:</p>
<ol>
<li>Notarized, completed <a href="https://eforms.state.gov/Forms/ds5542.PDF" title="Form DS-5542 PDF" adhocenable="false" target="_blank">Form DS-5542</a></li>
<li>Photocopy of a valid photo ID<i> </i>(examples: state-issued driver's license, passport, or military ID) </li>
<li>Check or money order. The cost is $50 if you need a new copy of your Panama Canal Zone record.<ol>
<li>Make payable to the "U.S. Department of State"</li>
<li>Include a complete mailing address on the check</li>
<li>Must be payable in U.S. dollars through a U.S. bank</li>
</ol>
</li>
</ol>
<p>Mail your notarized Form DS-5542, photocopy of your ID, and payment to:</p>
<p>    U.S. Department of State<br>
    Passport Vital Records<br>
    44132 Mercure Circle<br>
    PO Box 1213<br>
    Sterling, VA 20166-1213</p>
<ul>
</ul>

        <div class="additional_component parsys"></div>
 
    </div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="custom_dateselect section">
